topic.what: automated constant-time verification at binary level to detect secret-dependent jumps and memory accesses
topic.how: path-sensitive abstract interpretation with multi-taint system (red=confirmed secret-dependent orange=may-be-overapproximated) that automatically classifies violations as confirmed or potential
topic.why_matters: existing overapproximation tools require manual verification of all findings; this approach reduces analyst workload by guaranteeing confirmed violations are true positives (unless in dead code)

characteristics.what_it_measures: proportion of known timing leaks detected
characteristics.evidence: benchmark of cryptographic implementations including tiny-AES BearSSL libhydrogen ML-KEM
characteristics.context: detected all 98 known leaks across non-CT programs

characteristics.what_it_measures: proportion of violations automatically confirmed vs requiring manual verification
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs standard taint analysis requiring verification of all 98 findings
characteristics.evidence: overapproximation program was only case with unconfirmed violations
characteristics.context: confirmed violations guaranteed true positives unless in dead code

characteristics.what_it_measures: duration to complete exhaustive binary analysis
characteristics.value: 2s to 666s for most programs (2827s for hydrogen-sign 666s for ml-kem-indcpa-dec)
characteristics.vs_baseline: comparable to Microwalk (dynamic analysis) faster than Binsec/Rel which times out on larger programs
characteristics.evidence: evaluation on 15 CT and non-CT cryptographic programs
characteristics.context: timeout set at 3600s; Binsec/Rel times out or hits depth limits on most programs

characteristics.what_it_measures: ability to analyze large real-world cryptographic implementations
characteristics.value: analyzed BearSSL AES CBC implementations ml-kem reference
characteristics.vs_baseline: Binsec/Rel (sound+complete) only completes on small utilities; SCOUT-CT completes all benchmarks
characteristics.context: only tool achieving exhaustive analysis on all programs including post-quantum KEM

characteristics.what_it_measures: guarantee no actual leaks go undetected
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs Microwalk (not sound) which can miss leaks
characteristics.evidence: abstract interpretation proof of correctness in paper

novelty: multi-taint system with red-orange-green to track overapproximation
automatic confirmed vs potential violation classification
proof of correctness in abstract interpretation framework
open_problems: consolidation threshold tuning for optimal precision-scalability tradeoff
dead code handling as potential spurious confirmed violations
